flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ulster County Community College rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.2k → $4.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ulster County Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.6k → $12.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Ulster County Community College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.8k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ulster County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
